# hush_azure_app_access_credential (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an Azure app access credential in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_azure_app_access_credential" "example" {
  id = "acr-eu12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Azure app access credential

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The Azure client ID (must be a valid UUID)
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `description` (String) The description of the Azure app access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
- `name` (String) The name of the Azure app access credential
- `tenant_id` (String) The Azure tenant ID (must be a valid UUID)
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
